nasb.text: Beloved, do not be surprised at the fiery ordeal among you, which comes upon you for your testing, as though some strange thing were happening to you;

esv.text: Beloved, do not be surprised at the fiery trial when it comes upon you to test you, as though something strange were happening to you.

cnv.text: 親愛的，有火煉的試驗臨到你們，不要以為奇怪，好像是遭遇非常的事，

ccb.text: 亲爱的弟兄姊妹，若有火一般的试炼临到你们，不要觉得奇怪，以为发生了什么不寻常的事，

csbs.text: 各位蒙爱的人哪，当火一样的考验临到你们中间，给你们试炼的时候，你们不要感到奇怪，好像发生了怪异的事。
